opportunities.title: Healthcare AI Solutions Framework
opportunities.summary: National framework for healthcare AI across eight lots: radiology and imaging, pathology and early detection, virtual and robotic health, predictive analytics, research and development, operational efficiency, advisory and specialised support, and combined solutions.
opportunities.means: The procurement route for UK healthcare AI for the next four years. Lots 6 and 7 (operational efficiency and advisory) are the quieter opportunity. The 23 June deadline is tight: clinical evidence packs and DCB0129 documentation take weeks.

opportunities.title: Tech Innovation Framework / GP IT Futures
opportunities.summary: Assured core GP IT systems and digital products for primary care, bought via the Digital Care Services catalogue. Tech Innovation Framework is the successor to GP IT Futures.
opportunities.means: Essential route for anything touching primary care. GP IT Futures continuity contracts run only to June 2026. If primary care is a target market, getting onto TIF is the gating step.

opportunities.title: MedTech Funding Mandate
opportunities.summary: Mandates NHS commissioners and providers to fund a defined list of NICE-approved cost-saving devices, diagnostics and digital products.
opportunities.means: Not a tender. It's a route to guaranteed local funding. Eligibility: positive NICE guidance, net saving within three years, budget impact under £20m a year. Worth understanding early if a NICE pathway is in reach.

opportunities.title: G-Cloud (Digital Marketplace)
opportunities.summary: Cross-government framework for cloud hosting, software (SaaS) and digital support. The primary procurement route for software-based digital health products.
opportunities.means: The most relevant framework for digital health SaaS. Being listed makes a product discoverable to every NHS buyer. Application windows open periodically, worth tracking.
